name: Logan Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Logan Pickleball Courts in Logan, OH! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Mingo Park
description: Mingo Park is a place to play pickleball in Logan, OH. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.
